subject: LU-10973 lnet: fix path issues in scripts running lutf

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

parents.subject: LU-10973 lnet: cleanup checkpatch issues for LUTF

commit.subject: LU-10973 lnet: fix path issues in scripts running lutf
commit.message:
LU-10973 lnet: fix path issues in scripts running lutf

This is a test patch that attempts to fix the lutf start up
scripts to be able to use paths that work properly when run
in the lustre build environment as well as after being
installed.

Test-Parameters: @lnet
Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Signed-off-by: Amir Shehata <ashehata@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia3c2bf7bc904a7a35e25e11edbdf37a6e7280dd7
